zh.lifeSummary: 當James H Morrison於1628年8月27日出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥時，他的父親Robert Morrison32歲，母親Janet Sharpe29歲。他於大約1649年與Sarah Jane Evans在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他於1688年登記服兵役。他去世於1717年2月16日在愛爾蘭庫迪 隆多德利享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James H Morrison于1628年8月27日出生在苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥时，他的父亲Robert Morrison32岁，母亲Janet Sharpe29岁。他于大约1649年与Sarah Jane Evans在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他于1688年登记服兵役。他去世于1717年2月16日在爱尔兰庫迪 隆多德利享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Morrison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: from Ó Muirgheasáin ‘descendant of Muirgheasán’, a diminutive of Muirgheas, a personal name meaning ‘sea valor’.
Scottish: from Gaelic Mac Moireasdain ‘son of Moireasdan’, a personal name cognate with Irish Muirgheasán’ (see 1 above).
Scottish and English: patronymic from the personal name   Morris  .

variants.name: Morson
meanings: English, Scottish and Irish: shortened form of   Morrison  .
English: sometimes a variant of Moorsom, a habitational name from Moorsholm in North Yorkshire. The placename derives from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + hūsum, dative plural form of hūs ‘house’.

variants.name: Morris
meanings: English and Scottish: from Maurice, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from Latin Mauritius, a derivative of Maurus (see Moore ). This was the name of several early Christian saints. In some cases it may be a nickname of the same derivation for someone with a swarthy complexion.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muirghis, a variant of Ó Muirgheasa (see Morrissey ).

Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Meurig (from Latin Mauritius), which was gradually superseded in Wales by Morus, Morys, a derivative of the Anglo-Norman French form of the name (see 1 above).

variants.name: McCorriston
meanings: Scottish (Wigtownshire): probably from Mac Thoireasdain ‘son of Tòireasdan or Tòrasdan’, a Gaelicized form of the Old Norse name Thórrsteinn ‘thunder stone’. It may also be from a lenited form of Gaelic Mac Moireasdain ‘son of Moireasdan’; see Morrison .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.description: Great Catholic-Gaelic rebellion for return of lands, later joined by Old English Catholics in Ireland. Under leadership of Irish chieftain, Rory O'More, conspiracy was formed to seize Dublin and expel the English. English settlers were driven out of Ulster. Catholics hold 59% of land in Ireland.

The Protestant Lord Protector of England, Oliver Cromwell, landed at Dublin. His troops killed 2,000 men. A great part of lands in Munster, Leinster and Ulster (Drogheda and Wexford) was confiscated and divided among the English soldiers.
Over 6,000 Irish boys and women sold as slaves since England gained control of Jamaica.
William of Orange (William III) lands at Carrickfergus and defeats James II at Battle of the Boyne.
Exclusion of Catholics from Parliament and all professions.
Catholics hold just 7% of land in Ireland.

en.lifeSummary: When James H Morrison was born on 27 August 1628, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, Robert Morrison, was 32 and his mother, Janet Sharpe, was 29. He married Sarah Jane Evans about 1649, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He registered for military service in 1688. He died on 16 February 1717, in County Londonderry, Ireland, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James H Morrison est né le 27 août 1628, à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Robert Morrison, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Janet Sharpe, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Jane Evans environ 1649, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1688. Il est décédé le 16 février 1717, à County Londonderry, Irlande, à l’âge de 88 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: James H Morrison(이)가 1628년 8월 27일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Morrison(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Sharpe(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1649년 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 Sarah Jane Evans(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1688년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1717년 2월 16일 아일랜드 카운티 런도더리에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James H Morrison nasceu em 27 de agosto de 1628, em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Robert Morrison, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Janet Sharpe, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Jane Evans aproximadamente 1649, em Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1688. Ele faleceu em 16 de fevereiro de 1717, em County Londonderry, Irlanda, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James H Morrison родился 27 августа 1628 г. в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Robert Morrison было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Janet Sharpe, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Jane Evans около 1649 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. В 1688 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 16 февраля 1717 г. в местности коунти лондондирри, Ирландия в возрасте 88 лет.
